name: Sequential Rename
description: Renames selected layers: incremental naming and/or search-replace in existing names

steps.args: var raw = results[0]; var data = JSON.parse(raw); var items = data.selection || (Array.isArray(data) ? data : []); var valid = items.filter(function(o) { return o && o.id; }); if (valid.length === 0) throw new Error('No objects selected.'); setVar('selCount', String(valid.length)); setVar('selItems', valid);
steps.label: Validate selection

steps.args: var prefix = vars.prefix || ''; var start = parseInt(vars.startNumber, 10); if (isNaN(start)) start = 1; var search = vars.searchText || ''; var replace = vars.replaceText || ''; var items = vars.selItems; var renames = []; for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) { var name; if (prefix) { name = prefix + String(start + i); } else { name = items[i].name; } if (search) { name = name.split(search).join(replace); } renames.push({ id: items[i].id, name: name }); } setVar('renames', renames); setVar('count', String(renames.length));
steps.label: Build names
